text.title: north-star-metric Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for north-star-metric as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Choosing multiple North Star metrics ("we have two NSMs").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Two NSMs produce the same misalignment problem the NSM was designed to solve. Teams trade off between them differently; there is no single shared success definition. Use input metrics for team-level targets, not additional NSMs.

failure-mode.description: NSM that requires a paragraph to explain.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If the entire company cannot understand the metric from a one-sentence description, it will not align behavior. Simplify until it passes the "explain to a new hire in 10 seconds" test.

failure-mode.description: Setting the NSM and not reviewing the correlation for more than a quarter.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Products evolve; metrics that were predictive at one stage become vanity metrics at the next. A stale NSM silently misaligns the company for months before anyone notices.
